gate.signinBody: this is the admin area — sign in with your demat account to open it.
gate.notAdminTitle: this area is for demat admins
gate.notAdminBody: your account doesn't have admin access. if that seems wrong, ping courtney.

common.genericError: something went wrong — please try again
common.loadError: we couldn't load this right now.

hub.heading: admin
hub.subtitle: the partner platform back office — approvals, partners and what's new.
hub.notificationsEmpty: no notifications yet — it's quiet in here.

approvals.heading: approval queue
approvals.subtitle: oldest first — fix small things yourself, then approve or send it back.
approvals.empty: the queue is empty — nothing to review right now.
approvals.fieldsHint: everything here is editable — fix minor errors before you decide.
approvals.photosHint: you can add your own photos or remove the partner's.
approvals.holdDepositHint: max 20% of the price, capped at €25
approvals.invalidAmount: one of the amounts isn't a number — write it like 12,50
approvals.approveConfirmBody: this lists the item live on the site straight away — customers can reserve it.
approvals.rejectBody: tell the partner what to fix — they'll get your reason and a link to edit and resubmit the item.
approvals.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. the photos are too dark — please retake them in daylight
approvals.rejectReasonRequired: a reason is required — the partner needs to know what to fix.
approvals.rejectedNote: "{title}" was sent back to the partner with your reason.

priceErrors.capability_required: the item needs to be for sale, for rental, or both
priceErrors.purchase_price_required: a sale price is required when the item is for sale
priceErrors.rental_price_required: a rental price is required when the item is rentable
priceErrors.invalid_discount: the member discount must be between 0 and 100
priceErrors.invalid_rental_weeks: rental length must stay between 2 and 4 weeks
priceErrors.deposit_exceeds_price: the rental deposit can't be higher than the sale price
priceErrors.cap_exceeded: the reservation hold is over the cap (20% of the price, max €25)

partners.heading: partners
partners.subtitle: the shops on the platform — create, edit, and get them ready to sell.
partners.empty: no partners yet — create the first one below.
partners.name: name
partners.slugHint: used in the shop's web address — lowercase and hyphens only
partners.feesActive: charge fees (leave off during the pilot)
partners.createdNote: "{name}" is on the platform — next: create their login and start stripe onboarding.
partners.slugTaken: that slug is already taken — pick another one
partners.loginBody: add the email the partner will sign in with.
partners.loginSuccess: done — when they first sign in with this email, the account links automatically.
partners.connectBody: start stripe onboarding to generate the partner's setup link.
partners.connectSuccess: send this link to the partner — they open it to set up their stripe payouts.
